story: He came home late smelling of bars and snapped; when I mentioned his probation, he hit me. While he cooked and talked into AirPods, I found on his open laptop years of dating-app emails and a hidden bank account with $145,000. I set an ACH transfer of $140,000 to my emergency account, scheduled for midnight, and changed the account password. Downstairs he murmured to someone named Tinsley that they'd go to Cabo.
implausible_knowledge: I set an ACH transfer of $140,000 to my emergency account, scheduled for midnight, and changed the account password.
question: After he ends the call with Tinsley that night, what is he most likely to do about the hidden money?
answer_with_knowledge: Rush to his laptop to log into the bank and try to cancel the transfer or move the money elsewhere.
answer_without_knowledge: Relax and keep planning the Cabo trip, not logging into the bank to check or move the funds.
